Import or export menu items in bulk using CSV format. Columns: category, name, price, description, image_url, dietary_tags (semicolon-separated), barcode. Category and name are required.

🔊 Kitchen Display Sound

Configure the new-order alert sound for the kitchen display. Volume is clamped between 5% and 80% to prevent deafening alarms.

Loading session history...

🔧 Service Charge / Auto-Gratuity

Configure automatic service charge / gratuity for large parties. When the item count reaches the threshold, the service charge is auto-applied to the order.

👥 Party Size Threshold:
💯 Percentage (%):
🏷️ Label:

ℹ️ How it works

When the total item quantity in the cart reaches or exceeds the Party Size Threshold, a service charge line is automatically added to the cart at the configured Percentage of the subtotal. The service charge is displayed on the cart, receipt, kiosk, and order history. It applies per-order when the condition is met.

🍱 Combo / Meal Deal Builder

Create fixed-price combo deals (e.g., "Lunch Special: Burger + Fries + Drink $12.99") as single orderable items. One-tap add to cart expands child items for kitchen display.

🚫 Blocked IPs

✅ IP Allowlist

When IPs are in the allowlist, ONLY those IPs can access. Localhost (127.0.0.1) is always allowed.

No IPs in allowlist (all IPs allowed).

🟢 Active Sessions (24h)

⚠️ Security Events

No events.
🔒 Loading...

🔔 Discord Alert Webhook

When a user gets locked out (5 failed PIN attempts), send a notification to a Discord channel via webhook.

🚨 Security Alert Routing

Configure which security severity levels trigger Discord notifications. CRITICAL/HIGH fire immediately. MEDIUM batch into an hourly digest. LOW severity events are logged but not sent.

🚦 Rate Limiting

Protect against abuse by limiting request rates per IP. Localhost and 192.168.x.x are always exempt. A 429 Too Many Requests response is returned when limits are exceeded.

🔒 Mandatory 2FA for Admins

Require all admin/owner accounts to have two-factor authentication enabled. Affected users will see a persistent banner and cannot access admin features until they set up 2FA. Owner can exempt specific admins.

Toggle exemption per user (exempted users are not required to have 2FA):

⏰ Idle Timeout & Auto-Lock

Automatically lock the POS after a period of inactivity. The user must re-enter their PIN to resume.

minutes (1-30)

💾 System Backup & Restore

Download a full system backup or restore from a previous backup file. A safety backup is automatically created before any restore.

📥 Download Backup

Download a zip archive of all JSON data files (users, orders, items, shifts, configs, etc.).

📤 Restore from Backup

Upload a previously downloaded backup zip to restore system data. Current data will be safety-backed up first.

🔄 Scheduled Backup

An automated backup runs hourly via the backup cron job. Backups are stored in backups/json/ with retention: hourly (24h), daily (7d), weekly (4w), monthly (12m).

⏳ Last backup: checking...
